rulings.Case Title: WATERVIEW DEVELOPMENT LLC VS. VINCENT T.C. TAI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Vincent T.C. Tai'S Notice Of Motion For Attorneys' Fees On Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 17, 2021 line 1. Defendant Vincent T.C. Tai's Notice Of Motion For Attorneys' Fees On Appeal is continued to July 8, 2021 for the moving party to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers no later than June 24, 2021 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Motion currently pending in department 302 on July 2, 2021 is also going to be heard in department 501 on July 8, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: TONY CHI HUA VS. DAMES SHOUMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-21-667664 WITH CASE CGC-21-589579
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 17, 2021 line 7. PLAINTIFF TONY HUA'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-21-667664 WITH CASE CGC-21-589579 is GRANTED. The Court will have a hearing in order to address the costs associated with the ownership of the property during the pendency of the litigation. Upon consolidation of these matters Tony Chi Hua will be required to (1) post with the Court the contractual rent amount in the equivalent of last month rent before the expiration of the Lease; or (2) pay all taxes, insurance and maintenance costs for the premises. By no later than 9:00 a.m. on June 17, 2021 parties to file declarations limited to the following information: (1) the amount of rent due under the lease on the last month before Lease expiration; (2) property insurance amounts and due dates; (2) property tax amounts and due dates; (3) property maintenance costs, e.g. security, utilities paid by owner, etc. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
